observations.summary: Speech is rendered incomprehensible and ineffective, symbolizing a loss of communication and power.

evidence.quote: When you speak, no man shall understand.

observations.notes: This suggests a curse or fate that isolates the speaker by making their words unintelligible.

observations.summary: The instrument of speech is destroyed, indicating a severance of the means to communicate or express truth.
observations.notes: The 'instrument' likely refers to the voice or tongue as a tool for conveying meaning.

observations.summary: The tongue becomes a heavy burden, forced to speak a foretold truth that is perceived only as meaningless noise.

evidence.quote: Your tongue shall be made a heavy thing, speaking a foretold truth that is only ever heard as noise—the worthless babble of the judged.

observations.notes: This highlights the tragic irony of possessing truth that is ignored or dismissed as worthless.
